abilities.name: Balancing the Scales
abilities.text: Once per activation. When resolving an attack targeting this model, if this model suffers damage, this model may drain a (soulstone) to deal an equal amount of damage to the attacking model.

abilities.name: Demise (Redemption)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, it may draw up to its maximum hand size. Then, a friendly Lady Justice may be placed into base contact with this model.

actions.name: Tip the Scales
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Finger on the Scale: Place a friendly Lady Justice into base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Condemn
triggers.text: Non-master only. Kill this model. The target gains a Craven token.

actions.name: Chain Gang
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Another friendly model only. Once per turn.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 3". Then, this model may move up to 3", which must end within 3" of the target.

actions.name: Healing Energy
actions.effects: Target heals 2. For each raise this action receives, the target heals an additional +2.

actions.name: Resupply
actions.effects: Draw up to two cards from this model's discard pile with values of 1-5.
